title: Multiples: The Price-Earnings (P/E) ratio is calculated as the current share...
summary: Identify the role of valuation multiples in comparative analysis.
prompt: The Price-Earnings (P/E) ratio is calculated as the current share price divided by the company's earnings per share (EPS).
solution: The P/E ratio is a common financial metric used to evaluate a company's valuation by comparing its current share price to its earnings per share, indicating how much investors are willing to pay for each dollar of earnings.
